findings: Bundle shape explicitly documented in commander.agent.md:254-282 with required fields
Required: task_id, run_id, commander_id, status, role, profile, swarm_scale, branch, summary, confidence, telemetry
Timing NOT in final bundle (only in swarm-state.json launch_proof)
Per-worker success/failure NOT in bundle—only aggregate children_failed count
Validation is proof-based (launch counts) not full-schema validation before write
README.md does not document full bundle schema
